title: Gemini Live is coming to your old Google Home devices
excerpt: Plus, Gemini Live gains a 15-minute conversational window
content_html:
Published Jul 24, 2026, 12:52 AM EDT

I've been writing about Android since 2011, with a focus on device reviews, Samsung and Google Pixel hardware, and the latest happenings in the ecosystem. In my entire writing career, I've reviewed more than 75 Android phones.

Carrying both a Samsung or Pixel flagship and an iPhone as a daily driver provides me with deep insight into how Android works and how it compares to iOS.

I have been writing for Android Police since 2021, covering news, how-tos, and features. You can find my previous work on Neowin, AndroidBeat, Times of India, iPhoneHacks, MySmartPrice, and MakeUseOf.

When not working, I tend to mindlessly scroll through X, play with new AI models, or go on long road trips. You can reach out to me on X or drop a mail at rajesh@androidpolice.com.

Sign in to your Android Police account

Since October 2025, Gemini Live has been available on several Google smart speakers and displays, including the Nest Mini, Nest Hub, Nest Hub Max, and Nest Audio. Google left the original Google Home Mini and Nest Hub out in the cold, likely due to their aging hardware. But with the latest round of Google Home improvements, the company is bringing Gemini Live to some of its oldest smart home devices.

With the July 23, 2026, update for Gemini for Home, Google is expanding Gemini Live's access to its first-gen smart speakers and displays: the Nest Hub and Home Mini. However, availability is paywalled behind the Google Home Premium subscription.

If you own any of the above devices and pay for the Home Premium subscription, you can start talking to Gemini Live by saying, “Hey Google, let's chat."

More importantly, the update addresses a major frustrating issue with using Gemini Live on smart home devices: the lack of contextual memory. On PC and phone, Gemini can store relevant information from previous conversations for better future responses.

So far, that has not been the case with Gemini Live on smart devices. That's changing now, with Google adding a 15-minute conversational window across Gemini for Home. So the AI-powered assistant will retain the context of your conversation for 15 minutes, allowing you to ask follow-up questions or revisit something you said earlier without starting over.

For example, if you ask Gemini to raise the temperature in your bedroom by 2 degrees, you can ask it to raise it by another degree a few minutes later.

Google Home app picks up several useful improvements

Besides Gemini for Home, Google is rolling out several improvements to the Google Home app. Now, when you save an automation without any starters, the app will clearly show an alert. Controls and labels for smart blinds and other window coverings have also been improved, making it easier to set them to a precise position.

For smart locks, the Google Home app will remind you that passcodes must be manually changed or removed when you remove a member or leave a home.

The update also contains the following reliability and performance improvements:

  • Enhanced iOS Video Experience: We’ve lowered playback error rates and improved stream availability closer to real-time on iOS Google Home App.
  • Seamless video playback resuming: We've fixed an issue where video feeds that had been in progress failed to resume properly after unlocking your phone.
  • Improved app link navigation: We've fixed deep link navigation so opening device setup or settings links brings you directly to the correct screen.
  • Fixed missing battery alerts: We've corrected an issue where full camera batteries were incorrectly reported as having zero hours remaining.

Nest Cameras are getting an update too, which promises to improve connection reliability, a smoother and faster setup process, and more accurate activity zones.

Lastly, Walmart's onn-branded Outdoor Camera and Floodlight Camera Hardwired are now a part of the Gemini built-in program.

content_html_zh:
发布于 2026 年 7 月 24 日上午 12:52（美国东部时间）

自 2011 年以来，我一直在撰写有关 Android 的文章，重点关注设备评论、三星和 Google Pixel 硬件以及生态系统中的最新动态。 在我的整个写作生涯中，我评测过超过 75 款 Android 手机。

日常驾驶时同时携带三星或 Pixel 旗舰产品和 iPhone，让我能够深入了解 Android 的工作原理以及它与 iOS 的比较。

自 2021 年以来，我一直为 Android Police 撰写文章，内容涵盖新闻、操作方法和功能。 您可以在 Neowin、AndroidBeat、Times of India、iPhoneHacks、MySmartPrice 和 MakeUseOf 上找到我之前的作品。

不工作时，我倾向于无意识地浏览 X、玩新的人工智能模型，或者进行长途旅行。 您可以通过 X 联系我或发送邮件至 rajesh@androidpolice.com。

登录您的 Android Police 帐户

自 2025 年 10 月起，Gemini Live 已在多款 Google 智能音箱和显示器上推出，包括 Nest Mini、Nest Hub、Nest Hub Max 和 Nest Audio。 谷歌将最初的 Google Home Mini 和 Nest Hub 冷落了，可能是因为它们的硬件老化。 但随着最新一轮 Google Home 的改进，该公司正在将 Gemini Live 带入一些最古老的智能家居设备中。

随着 2026 年 7 月 23 日的 Gemini for Home 更新，Google 正在扩大 Gemini Live 对其第一代智能扬声器和显示器的访问范围：Nest Hub 和 Home Mini。 不过，Google Home Premium 订阅后的可用性是付费的。

如果您拥有上述任何设备并支付了 Home Premium 订阅费用，您可以通过说“嘿 Google，我们聊天吧”开始与 Gemini Live 交谈。

更重要的是，该更新解决了在智能家居设备上使用 Gemini Live 的一个主要令人沮丧的问题：缺乏上下文记忆。 在电脑和手机上，Gemini 可以存储之前对话的相关信息，以便将来做出更好的回应。

到目前为止，智能设备上的 Gemini Live 还没有出现这种情况。 现在情况正在改变，谷歌在 Gemini for Home 上添加了 15 分钟的对话窗口。 因此，人工智能助理将保留您对话的上下文 15 分钟，让您可以提出后续问题或重新审视之前说过的内容，而无需重新开始。

例如，如果你要求 Gemini 将卧室的温度提高 2 度，你可以要求它在几分钟后再提高一度。

Google Home 应用程序获得了多项有用的改进

除了 Gemini for Home 之外，谷歌还对 Google Home 应用程序进行了多项改进。 现在，当您保存没有任何启动器的自动化时，应用程序将清楚地显示警报。 智能百叶窗和其他窗帘的控制和标签也得到了改进，可以更轻松地将它们设置到精确位置。

对于智能锁，Google Home应用程序会提醒您，当您删除成员或离开家时，必须手动更改或删除密码。

此更新还包含以下可靠性和性能改进：

  • 增强的 iOS 视频体验：我们降低了播放错误率，并提高了 iOS Google Home 应用上的流可用性，使其更接近实时。
  • 无缝视频播放恢复：我们解决了解锁手机后无法正常恢复正在进行的视频播放的问题。
  • 改进的应用程序链接导航：我们修复了深层链接导航，因此打开设备设置或设置链接可直接将您带到正确的屏幕。
  • 修复了丢失的电池警报：我们纠正了相机电池电量不足时错误地报告为剩余零小时的问题。

Nest 相机也进行了更新，有望提高连接可靠性、更流畅、更快速的设置过程以及更准确的活动区域。

最后，沃尔玛的自有品牌户外摄像机和硬连线泛光灯摄像机现已成为 Gemini 内置程序的一部分。
